name: certificate_number_present
expression: certificate_number IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(certificate_number)) > 0
description: certificate_number is required for Certificate of Analysis extraction.

name: certificate_date_present
expression: certificate_date IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(certificate_date)) > 0
description: certificate_date is required for Certificate of Analysis extraction.

name: supplier_name_present
expression: supplier_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(supplier_name)) > 0
description: supplier_name is required for Certificate of Analysis extraction.

name: material_name_present
expression: material_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(material_name)) > 0
description: material_name is required for Certificate of Analysis extraction.

name: lot_number_present
expression: lot_number IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(lot_number)) > 0
description: lot_number is required for Certificate of Analysis extraction.

name: test_results_present
expression: test_results IS NOT NULL AND JSON_ARRAY_LENGTH(test_results) > 0
description: test_results is required for Certificate of Analysis extraction.
